name: Twenty CRM
description: Connect your Twenty CRM workspace to manage people, companies, notes, tasks, and any custom object

baseUrl.label: Twenty API URL
baseUrl.description: Your Twenty workspace API URL. Twenty Cloud: https://api.twenty.com. Self-hosted: your instance URL. Do not include the /rest path.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Twenty API key. Generate one under Settings → APIs & Webhooks → Generate API Key.
